task_summary: Add deployment guard pre-flight to e2e-test-engineer agent and pipeline skills

change_plan.description: Add 3-step deployment pre-flight between step 2 (read E2E config) and existing step 3 (check infrastructure). New step 3 checks Local Deployment config, dispatches deployment-verifier if present, emits warning if absent. Renumber existing steps 3-8 to 4-9.

Before step 8a (E2E test-engineer), add deployment-verifier dispatch when Local Deployment is configured. Guard: if Local Deployment section exists, run deployment-verifier (action: start), block on non-HEALTHY verdict.
Same as fix-ticket but at step 7a (E2E test-engineer).
Same as fix-ticket but at step 6f (E2E test).
Same as fix-ticket but at Step 8 (E2E Tests).
Add v6.2.0 entry with Added section for deployment guard feature.
Move 'E2E Test Engineer: Deployment Guard' from PLANNED to DONE section.

risks: Step renumbering in e2e-test-engineer.md must be consistent
4 skill files have slightly different step numbering (8a, 7a, 6f, Step 8) — each needs unique edit
Tests reference e2e-test-engineer structure — must preserve frontmatter and section order
